86.en: messages that were exchanged. So down here, I've got my initial user message, then our assistant message
86.zh_tw: 交換的訊息列表。下面有初始使用者訊息，然後是助手訊息，
86.zh_cn: 交换的信息列表。下面有初始使用者信息，然后是助手信息，

87.en: in which Claude decides to use the text edit tool. And specifically, it wants to try to view a file,

87.zh_cn: Claude 决定使用 text edit 工具。具体來说它要查看文件，

88.zh_tw: 我們送回檔案內容。Claude 說好的，知道裡面有什麼了，
88.zh_cn: 我们送回文件內容。Claude 说好的，知道里面有什麼了，

89.zh_tw: 現在要替換內容，寫入新內容。可以看到這裡
89.zh_cn: 现在要替换內容，写入新內容。可以看到这里

90.en: here is the actual implementation of calculating pi. Then if we go a little bit further down,

91.zh_tw: 回應說成功更新了檔案。Claude 接著嘗試
91.zh_cn: 回应说成功更新了文件。Claude 接著嘗试

92.en: to create the test dot pi file and write some text into it specifically some tests to test out the
92.zh_tw: 建立 test.py 檔案並寫入一些文字，特別是測試剛才

93.en: implementation it just put together. We can verify that this all happened by taking a look at the
93.zh_tw: 建立的實作。可以查看更新後的 main.py 來驗證。

94.en: newly updated main dot pi file. So we will now see an implementation for calculating pi,

94.zh_cn: 现在能看到计算圓周率的实作，

96.en: using this tool, we can very easily approximate a rather fancy code editor. And you might be thinking,

97.zh_tw: 那我為什麼不直接用程式碼編輯器？在某些應用場景中你可能想編輯
